positive_prompt: The cat calmly steps forward out of the litter tray, placing each paw naturally on the floor as its weight shifts smoothly off the rim. Its head stays alert and turns slightly toward screen right, with subtle ear and tail movement. Keep the camera fixed, ending with the cat fully on the floor and continuing one gentle step forward.
scene_plan: Over the five-second fixed-camera shot, the cat steadily completes its exit rather than making a single quick step: it transfers weight onto the planted front paw, lowers the second front paw, brings each hind leg over the rim, and finishes fully on the floor with one gentle forward step. Small head, ear, and tail adjustments accompany the same movement, and the readable final state arrives near the end.
